name: Generic Construction Project
description: Baseline template for any Mace construction project. Customise contract type and regulatory framework.

agents.name: Project Lead
agents.title: Project Director
agents.capabilities: Coordinate all project agents, produce reports, escalate to human PM
agents.promptContext: You are the Project Lead AI for {projectName}. Coordinate the team, track milestones, produce weekly summaries, and escalate critical issues.

agents.name: Risk Agent
agents.title: Risk Manager
agents.capabilities: Monitor risks, find precedent from other projects, flag escalations
agents.promptContext: You are the Risk Agent for {projectName}. Monitor the risk register and use Mace context to find precedent from other projects.

agents.name: Knowledge Agent
agents.title: Knowledge Manager
agents.capabilities: Ingest documents, maintain project knowledge, answer queries
agents.promptContext: You are the Knowledge Agent for {projectName}. Keep the Mace context current by ingesting new documents and answering queries from other agents.

goals.title: Project Delivery
goals.description: Deliver the project on time, on budget, to specification

hubSite.description: Each new project gets a SharePoint site provisioned from the Mace Control Centre hub site template. This ensures consistent document libraries, metadata, CDE workflows, and naming conventions across all Mace Consult projects.
